zh.lifeSummary: 當Winifred Balle於大約1550年出生在英國時，她的父親Sir John Forster27歲，母親Lady Jane Radclyff22歲。她於1570年11月2日與Henry Rushall在英國諾薩普頓史爾巴德比結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1620年4月19日之前在英國英格蘭諾薩普頓史爾巴德比，埋葬在英國英格蘭諾薩普頓史爾巴德比。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Winifred Balle于大约1550年出生在英国时，她的父亲Sir John Forster27岁，母亲Lady Jane Radclyff22岁。她于1570年11月2日与Henry Rushall在英国諾薩普頓史爾巴德比结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1620年4月19日之前在英国英格兰諾薩普頓史爾巴德比，埋葬在英国英格兰諾薩普頓史爾巴德比。

nameMeanings.name: Balle
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Corina, Elidoro, Fernando, Geraldo, Humberto, Joaquin, Ruben.

variants.name: Ball
meanings: English: from Middle English bal, ball(e) ‘ball, sphere, globe, round body’ (Old French balle or Old English beall(a)), a nickname for a short, obese person.
English: topographic name for someone who lived on or by a knoll or rounded hill, from the same Middle English word, bal(le) as in 1 above, but applied topographically.
English: from a Middle English adjective ball (weak form balle) in the sense ‘bald’, from ball ‘white streak, bald place’.

variants.name: Batlle
meanings: Catalan: status name for a steward or official, batlle. Compare Balle .

nameMeanings.name: Winifred
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Anglicized form of the Welsh female personal name Gwenfrewi . The form of the name has been altered by association with   Winfred   and has been in general use among English speakers since the 16th century.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

historicEvents.title: The Royal Exchange is Organized
historicEvents.description: The Royal Exchange was organized in January 1571 by Sir Thomas Gresham. Gresham is known as the father of English banking.

historicEvents.title: Elizabeth I Signs Death Warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots
historicEvents.description: Elizabeth I signed the death warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots, on February 1, 1587, as she was found guilty of plotting to assasinate Elizabeth. Mary, Queen of Scots, was beheaded at Fotheringhay Castle in England on February 8, 1587.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Elizabeth I.org - Mary Queen of Scots

historicEvents.title: The Honourable East India Company
historicEvents.description: The Honourable East India Company, a British joint-stock company, was established in 1600 for trade in the Indian Ocean region. At its height, the British East India Company had a private army which was twice the size of the British Army, ruled large sections of India, and revenues in the millions.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Historic UK - The East India Company

historicEvents.title: The Pilgrims Board the Mayflower
historicEvents.description: "The Pilgrims boarded the Mayflower in search of religious freedom in the New World in September 1620. The Mayflower set sail from Plymouth, England, with 102 passengers, 40 of whom called themselves ""Saints."" After two stormy months at sea, the ship reached the New World. Nearly half of the group died during their first winter due to malnutrition and the harsh New England winter."

en.lifeSummary: When Winifred Balle was born about 1550, in England, her father, Sir John Forster, was 27 and her mother, Lady Jane Radclyff, was 22. She married Henry Rushall on 2 November 1570, in Badby, Northamptonshire, England. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 1 daughter. She died before 19 April 1620, in Badby, Northamptonshire, England, United Kingdom, and was buried in Badby, Northamptonshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Winifred Balle est née environ 1550, à Angleterre, son père, Sir John Forster, avait 27 ans et sa mère, Lady Jane Radclyff, avait 22 ans. Elle a épousé Henry Rushall le 2 novembre 1570, à Badby, Northamptonshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée avant 19 avril 1620, à Badby, Northamptonshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, et a été enterrée à Badby, Northamptonshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Winifred Balle um 1550 in England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir John Forster 27 und ihre Mutter Lady Jane Radclyff 22. Sie hat am 2. November 1570 in Badby, Northamptonshire, England Henry Rushall geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 1 Tochter. Sie starb vor 19. April 1620 in Badby, Northamptonshire, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Badby, Northamptonshire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Winifred Balle è nata il circa 1550 nel England, sua padre, Sir John Forster, aveva 27 anni e sua madre, Lady Jane Radclyff, aveva 22 anni. Lei sposato Henry Rushall il 2 novembre 1570, nel Badby, Northamptonshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 1 figlia. Morì prima del 19 aprile 1620, nel Badby, Northamptonshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, e fu sepolta a Badby, Northamptonshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Winifred Balleが約1550年にイギリスで生まれた時，父Sir John Forsterは27歳，母Lady Jane Radclyffは22歳であった。1570年11月2日にイギリスノーサンプトンシュアイアバドビーでHenry Rushallと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1620年4月19日以前にイギリスイギリスノーサンプトンシュアイアバドビーで死去し，イギリスイギリスノーサンプトンシュアイアバドビーにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Winifred Balle(이)가 대략 1550년 영국에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir John Forster(은)는 27세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Lady Jane Radclyff(은)는 22세였다. 그녀는 1570년 11월 2일 영국 노르섬프토실르 바드비에서 Henry Rushall(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1620년 4월 19일 이전 영국 잉글랜드 노르섬프토실르 바드비에서 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 노르섬프토실르 바드비에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Winifred Balle nasceu aproximadamente 1550, em Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir John Forster, tinha 27 anos e sua mãe, Lady Jane Radclyff, tinha 22 anos. Ela casou-se com Henry Rushall em 2 de novembro de 1570, em Badby, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 1 filha. Ela faleceu antes 19 de abril de 1620, em Badby, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, e foi sepultada em Badby, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Winifred Balle родилась около 1550 г. в местности Англия, её отцу по имени Sir John Forster было 27 лет, а матери, которую звали Lady Jane Radclyff, 22. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Henry Rushall 2 ноября 1570 г. в местности бадби, нортамптоншир, Англия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь. Она умерла перед 19 апрель 1620 г. в местности бадби, нортамптоншир, Англия, Великобритания и была похоронена в местности бадби, нортамптоншир, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Winifred Balle nació aproximadamente 1550, en Inglaterra, su papá, Sir John Forster, tenía 27 años y su mamá, Lady Jane Radclyff, tenía 22 años. Se casó con Henry Rushall el 2 de noviembre de 1570, en Badby, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 1 hija. Murió antes de 19 de abril de 1620, en Badby, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, y fue sepultada en Badby, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
